nasb.text: Woe to you, Moab! The people of Chemosh have perished; For your sons have been taken away captive And your daughters into captivity.

esv.text: Woe to you, O Moab! The people of Chemosh are undone, for your sons have been taken captive, and your daughters into captivity.

cnv.text: 摩押啊，你有禍了！ 基抹的人民滅亡了！ 因為你的眾子都被擄去了， 你的眾女兒也都被擄去了。

ccb.text: 拜基抹神明的摩押人啊， 你们有祸了！ 你们灭亡了！ 你们的儿女都被掳去了。
